query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.role,
  u.createdAt,
  edp.enabled AS digestEnabled,
  edp.frequency,
  edp.includeHotOnly,
  edp.includeContacts,
  edp.includePipelineUpdates,
  edp.lastSentAt,
  edp.updatedAt AS prefsUpdatedAt
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN emailDigestPrefs edp ON edp.userId = u.id
ORDER BY u.role DESC, u.name ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute

  edp.includeHotOnly,
  edp.includeContacts,
  edp.includePipelineUpdates,
  edp.lastSentAt,
  edp.updatedAt AS prefsUpdatedAt
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN emailDigestPrefs edp ON edp.userId = u.id
ORDER BY u.role DESC, u.name ASC;
